data.name: Smart Kisaan
data.description: AI-powered farming platform empowering Pakistani farmers with real-time market prices, weather forecasts, crop disease identification, and a bilingual AI assistant (English & Urdu). Built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Google Gemini AI.

data.name: Zameen Khatta
data.description: Full-stack real estate platform for Pakistan built with Next.js 13, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Prisma. Features property listings, admin panel, role-based auth (NextAuth.js), email notifications, Redis caching, and performance monitoring.

data.name: Mianaflix - Netflix Clone
data.description: Full-featured Netflix clone with React, Redux Toolkit, and Firebase Auth. Includes movie/TV browsing via TMDB API, trailer playback, search, My List, Continue Watching, multiple user profiles, and fully responsive Netflix-style UI.

data.name: SOLRUSH - Solana DEX
data.description: Decentralized exchange (DEX) built on Solana blockchain with Rust smart contracts. Features liquidity pools (SOL/USDC & SOL/USDT), market buy/sell, RUSH token rewards system, wallet integration, and a full trading UI deployed on Devnet.

data.name: Zakat Blockchain System
data.description: Blockchain-based Zakat management system with automatic 2.5% calculation, SHA-256 hashing, secure transaction tracking, and a Streamlit web dashboard. Implements custom blockchain with genesis blocks and chain validation.

data.name: Blockchain Attendance System
data.description: Three-tier hierarchical blockchain attendance management system (BAMS) with SHA-256 PoW mining. Features Department → Class → Student chain layers, real-time visualization, RESTful API, and React/TypeScript frontend deployed on Vercel.

data.name: MianaMask - MetaMask Clone
data.description: Fully functional MetaMask clone Chrome extension with wallet creation, account import via private keys, multi-account management, ETH transactions, multi-network support (Mainnet, Sepolia, Goerli), and Ethers.js blockchain interaction.

data.name: Movie Recommendation System
data.description: Content-based movie recommendation system using cosine similarity on bag-of-words vectors. Trained on TMDB 5000 Movies dataset with NLP preprocessing (Porter Stemmer). Interactive Streamlit web app with real-time movie poster fetching via TMDB API.

data.name: House Price Prediction
data.description: ML project predicting California house prices using Random Forest Regression (R² ~0.80). Features GridSearchCV hyperparameter tuning, feature engineering, comprehensive EDA, and an interactive Streamlit web app for real-time predictions.

data.name: YOLO Object Detection
data.description: Real-time object detection system using YOLOv8 (You Only Look Once) deep learning model. Trained on COCO dataset for detecting 80+ object classes with bounding boxes, confidence scores, and real-time video processing capabilities.

data.name: AI Resume Screening System
data.description: Intelligent ATS (Applicant Tracking System) using NLP and deep learning for automated resume screening. Features keyword matching, skill extraction, relevance scoring, and candidate ranking with BERT-based embeddings.

data.name: Rule-Based AI Chatbot
data.description: AI chatbot with regex pattern matching, modular Python architecture (Flask backend), and a modern responsive web interface. Supports greetings, help queries, identity, and conversational flows with randomized natural responses.
